description.title: Alternaria alternata SRC1lrK2f

assembly_info.comments:
URL -- http://genome.jgi.doe.gov/Altal1
JGI Project ID: 1029430
The DNA was provided by Cara Santelli, University of Minnesota(santelli@umn.edu)
The strain is available from Colleen Hansel, Woods Hole Oceanographic Institution, chansel@whoi.edu
Contacts: Colleen Hansel (chansel@whoi.edu)
Cara Santelli (santelli@umn.edu)
Assembly and annotation done by JGI.
The JGI and collaborators endorse the principles for the distribution and use of large scale sequencing data adopted by the larger genome sequencing community and urge users of this data to follow them. It is our intention to publish the work of this project in a timely fashion and we welcome collaborative interaction on the project and analysis.
(http://www.genome.gov/page.cfm?pageID=10506376)
